entities.name: VEGETABLES
entities.description: General category of produce studied for marketing efficiency in developing economies

entities.name: CARROT
entities.description: Specific vegetable cultivated and analyzed for marketing efficiency and farmer's share

entities.name: TOMATO
entities.description: Specific vegetable cultivated and analyzed for marketing efficiency and farmer's share

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Developing country where the study on vegetable marketing was conducted

entities.name: RAJASTHAN
entities.description: State in India providing evidence for critical intervention in vegetable marketing

entities.name: MARKETING CHANNELS
entities.description: The paths through which vegetables move from farmers to consumers

entities.name: RELATIVE PROFITABILITY
entities.description: The comparison of profit margins across different marketing channels

entities.name: MARKETING EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The effectiveness of the marketing system in delivering produce to consumers

entities.name: FARMER'S SHARE IN CONSUMER'S RUPEE
entities.description: The percentage of the final consumer price that returns to the farmer

entities.name: MARKETING EFFICIENCY INDEX
entities.description: A numerical measure used to quantify the efficiency of marketing channels

entities.name: AUCTION SYSTEM
entities.description: The prescribed system for selling produce to ensure fair price realization for farmers
